URL: https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium
Language: java
A browser automation framework and ecosystem.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WuKongOpenSource/Wukong-AICRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WuKongOpenSource/Wukong-AICRM
Language: java
The Open Source Salesforce + ChatGPT Manage Customers. Query Knowledge. Execute Tasks. All Through Conversation.

Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.

Language: java
The java implementation of Apache Dubbo. An RPC and microservice framework.

URL: https://github.com/apache/flink
Language: java
Apache Flink

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Learn Low Level Design (LLD) and prepare for interviews using free resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishps1/awesome-system-design-resources

Learn System Design concepts and prepare for interviews using free resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bazelbuild/bazel
Language: java
a fast, scalable, multi-language and extensible build system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bethington/ghidra-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bethington/ghidra-mcp
Language: java
Ghidra MCP Server — 200+ MCP tools for AI-powered reverse engineering. GUI plugin + headless server, lazy tool loading, convention enforcement, batch operations, Ghidra Server integration, and Docker deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbeaver/dbeaver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbeaver/dbeaver
Language: java
Free universal database tool and SQL client

ns0:entry.ns0:title: doocs/leetcode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/doocs/leetcode
Language: java
🔥LeetCode solutions in any programming language | 多种编程语言实现 LeetCode、《剑指 Offer（第 2 版）》、《程序员面试金典（第 6 版）》题解

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk
Language: java
Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: halo-dev/halo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/halo-dev/halo
Language: java
Halo 是一款强大易用的开源建站工具，从个人博客、知识库，到企业官网、在线商城，Halo 都能助您轻松实现，一站式满足您的多样化建站需求。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iluwatar/java-design-patterns
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iluwatar/java-design-patterns
Language: java
Design patterns implemented in Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI 低代码平台「低代码 + 零代码」双驱动！低代码可一键生成前后端代码;零代码可 5 分钟搭建系统;AI Skills 一句话画流程、设计表单、生成整套系统。内置 AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP插件等，兼容主流大模型。引领「AI 生成 → 在线配置 → 代码生成 → 手工合并->AI修改」开发模式，消除 Java 项目 80% 的重复工作，提效而不失灵活。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kekingcn/kkFileView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kekingcn/kkFileView
Language: java
Universal File Online Preview Project based on Spring-Boot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keycloak/keycloak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak
Language: java
Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spring-projects/spring-boot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot
Language: java
Spring Boot helps you to create Spring-powered, production-grade applications and services with absolute minimum fuss.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: testcontainers/testcontainers-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/testcontainers/testcontainers-java
Language: java
Testcontainers is a Java library that supports JUnit tests, providing lightweight, throwaway instances of common databases, Selenium web browsers, or anything else that can run in a Docker container.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trinodb/trino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trinodb/trino
Language: java
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
